title: Deschamps predicts 'spectacular' France v Spain semi-final
summary: France manager Didier Deschamps predicts a 'spectacular' World Cup semi-final against Spain, with both teams featuring attacking talent. The match will be played in Dallas.
content: France boss Didier Deschamps is predicting a "spectacular" semi-final when his exciting side take on Spain in a heavyweight World Cup showdown in Dallas.

zh.title: 德尚预测法国对西班牙半决赛将"壮观"
zh.summary: 法国主教练迪迪埃·德尚预测与西班牙的世界杯半决赛将"壮观"，两支球队都具有进攻天赋。比赛将在达拉斯进行。
